final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI design system for web dashboards, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls as separate components
Subject: must include all UI components: dashboard layout, mobile screen, card elements, button states, and control widgets
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-tech, visually striking atmosphere with rich depth — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool tech direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a layered, sophisticated surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all component types (Dashboard, mobile, cards, buttons, controls) as distinct elements
Avoid:
